title: Smoky Squash Flatbread
description: A flavorful flatbread topped with roasted smoky squash, perfect for a fall evening.
instructions: Cut the smoky squash into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with croatian olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder. Toss to coat.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Slice the flatbread into 4-6 pieces, depending on size. Grill for 2-3 minutes per side, or until crispy and slightly charred.
Top each piece of flatbread with roasted squash, shaved parmesan cheese, and a drizzle of croatian olive oil.
